title: Piccalilli
sources: Mrs Beeton, Book of Household Management (1861), recipes for piccalilli and Indian pickle — Project Gutenberg #10136.
Eliza Acton, Modern Cookery for Private Families (1845), pickle chapter.
Constance Spry recipes are post-1928 and not public domain; not cited.
notes: British mustard pickle (also called Indian pickle). Cauliflower, courgette/marrow, beans, onions, cucumber brined overnight then cooked into a turmeric/mustard sauce thickened with cornflour. Needs 3-4 weeks to mature. Sub-cat: preserves. Yields about 1.5 kg, three jars. Not freezable. Needs proper sterilised jars.
